visualizations.title: Cubing Equation
visualizations.description: The algebraic definition of cubing a value.

steps.explanation: n raised to the power of 3 (or 'n cubed').
Multiply the base number n by itself twice (three factors total).

visualizations.title: Isometric Cube Stacking
visualizations.description: Watch how multiplying a number by itself three times forms a 3D volume stack.
